<!-- source-snippet repo="splice" path="apps/app/src/pack/examples/sv-helm/validator-values.yaml" commit="889595d950391fec6acb767c4750ab37bd189a4b" snippet="splice-literal-marker-apps-app-src-pack-examples-sv-helm-validator-values-participant-pruning-schedule-start" location="stringMarker:PARTICIPANT_PRUNING_SCHEDULE_START-&gt;PARTICIPANT_PRUNING_SCHEDULE_END" -->
```yaml
  # To configure participant pruning uncomment the following section.
  # Refer to the documentation for more details.
  # participantPruningSchedule:
  #   cron: 0 /10 * * * ? # Run every 10min
  #   maxDuration: 5m # Run for a max of 5min per iteration
  #   retention: 48h # Retain history that is newer than 48h.
```
